title: Pentacalia lanceolifolia
intro: Pentacalia lanceolifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in the Andean region of South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Pentacalia lanceolifolia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Pentacalia lanceolifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness the plant's medicinal benefits and promote overall health and well-being.
